title: athyrium distentifolium var. americanum
intro: Athyrium distentifolium var. americanum, also known as American Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of American Lady Fern include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. American Lady Fern can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and has also been traditionally used as a poultice or compress to apply directly to the skin for wound healing and pain relief.
